review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Review only the provided diff. Never say you need to inspect files or run commands. Output the final verdict in the requested structure." --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-071-review-prompt-valid.txt > /tmp/cp00-071-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.title: Forward-looking review model identifier is embedded in metadata
findings.details: review_route_rows[0].review_model_ref is set to claude-opus-4-8 as declarative metadata. It is never executed and runtime review queue writes are prohibited.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the model id remains intentional or replace with a stable symbolic ref in a future hardening pack if model naming churn becomes noisy.

findings.title: Contract forbidden claim list is static while policy list is computed
findings.details: The contract records forbidden_boundary_suite_claims as a static JSON list while policies.js computes the policy list by extending CP00-070. Claude found both lists comprehensive for this pack, but no cross-check asserts equality.
findings.recommendation: Add a future consistency assertion if this provenance duplication becomes a maintenance risk.

findings.title: requested_pack_id matches the upstream pack id by live cursor correction
findings.details: requested_pack_id, upstream_primary_action_closeout_ref, and required_evidence_refs all point to CP00-070. This is consistent with the established sequential cursor pattern but can be misread.
findings.recommendation: No action required; keep correction_reason as the audit trail.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-071 is metadata-only and forward-looking; runtime enforcement of review/approval, security trimming, audit emission, and secondary permission matrix behavior is explicitly deferred.
Remaining risk is informational: model id metadata churn, static-vs-computed forbidden claim provenance, and live-cursor requested_pack_id semantics.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-071 ControlPlanePermissionAuditReviewApprovalSecondaryMatrix covers the planned 10 Risk-A units, consumes the CP00-070 primary action boundary, completes M03 metadata, opens M04, and preserves all no-write/fail-closed/LDIP-planning-only boundaries. Claude reported no P0/P1/P2 findings and three non-blocking P3 observations.

raw_result.result_excerpt: Verdict APPROVE. P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=3. Blocking findings none. Required fixes none. Residual risk low.
